title: "100 Years of World Scouting" Commemorative Issue Stamp Order, 2006, SRO 44 of 2006
text:
2006 STAMP S.R.O. 44
COMMONWEALTH OF DOMINICA
STATUTORY RULES AND ORDERS NO. 44 OF 2006
ORDER
MADE by the Minister under sections 3 and 4 of the Stamp Act,
(Chapter 68:01).
(Gazetted 28th December, 2006)
1. This Order may be cited as the- Short title.
“100 YEARS OF WORLD SCOUTING ”
COMMEMORATIVE STAMP ISSUE ORDER, 2006
2. In this Order, the term “stamp” means an adhesive stamp
Interpretation.
for postage and revenue.
3. During the period from 10th January, 2007 to 9th April, 2007 Stamps.
both days inclusive, there shall be issued throughout the State,
special Commonwealth of Dominica postage stamps (“100
YEARS OF WORLD SCOUTING” COMMEMORATIVE
STAMP ISSUE) of values and colours specified in Schedule I
Schedule I.
and the designs specified in Schedule II hereto. Schedule II.
4. The dies and other implements required to give effect to Dies.
this Order shall be destroyed together with all residue whatsoever
of all stamps authorized hereby, as soon as possible after the 9th
day of April, 2007
5. This Order shall come into effect on the 10th day of
Commencement.
January, 2007.

2006 STAMP S.R.O. 44
SCHEDULE I
Adhesive stamps will be as follows:
sheetlet of 3 stamps @ $3.50 - Red, Blue Yellow,
each depicts Green and White
sheetlet of 1 stamp @ $5.00 - Red, Green, Yellow,
each depicts White and Blue
SCHEDULE II
sheetlet of 4 stamps @ $3.50 - 100 Years of World
each depicts Scouting (1907-2007)
sheetlet of 1 stamp @ $5.00 - 100 Years of World
each depicts Scouting (1907-2007)
Made this 21st day of December, 2006
AMBROSE GEORGE
Minister for Public Works
and Public Utilities
DOMINICA
Printed by the Government of Printer at the Government Printery, Roseau
(Price 40 cents)

title: "250th Birthday of Mozart" Order, 2006, SRO 41 of 2006
text:
2006 STAMP S.R.O. 41
COMMONWEALTH OF DOMINICA
STATUTORY RULES AND ORDERS NO. 41 OF 2006
ORDER
MADE by the Minister under sections 3 and 4 of the Stamp Act,
(Chapter 68:01).
(Gazetted 28th December, 2006.)

“250TH BIRTHDAY OF MOZART ” COMMEMORA-
TIVE STAMP ISSUE ORDER, 2006
2. In this Order, the term “stamp” means an adhesive stamp
Interpretation.
for postage and revenue.
3. During the period from 1st September, 2006 to 30th Stamps.
November, 2006 both days inclusive, there shall be issued
throughout the State, special Commonwealth of Dominica post-
age stamps (“250TH BIRTHDAY OF MOZART” COM-
MEMORATIVE STAMP ISSUE) of values and colours speci-
fied in Schedule I and the designs specified in Schedule II hereto. Schedule I.
Schedule II.
4. The dies and other implements required to give effect to Dies.
this Order shall be destroyed together with all residue whatso-
ever of all stamps authorized hereby, as soon as possible after the
30th day of November, 2006.
5. This Order shall be deemed to have come into effect on
Commencement.
the 1st day of September, 2006.

2006 STAMP S.R.O. 41
SCHEDULE I

sheetlet of 4 stamps @ $3.00 - Red, Yellow, Black,
each depicts Green, White

each depicts Mozart (1756-1791)

and Public Utilities
DOMINICA
Printed by the Government of Printer at the Government Printery, Roseau

title: "Barack Obama, 44th President of The United States of America" Commemorative Stamp Issue Order, 2009, SRO 9 of 2009
text:
2009 STAMP S.R.O. 9
COMMONWEALTH OF DOMINICA
STATUTORY RULES AND ORDERS NO. 9 OF 2009
ORDER
MADE by the Minister under sections 3 and 4 of the Stamp Act,
Chapter 68:01.
(Gazetted 19th February, 2009)
1. This Order may be cited as the – Short title.
“BARACK OBAMA, 44TH PRESIDENT OF
THE UNITED STATES OF AMERICA”
COMMEMORATIVE STAMP ISSUE
ORDER, 2009.
2. In this Order the word “stamp” means an adhesive stamp
Interpretation.
for postage and revenue.
3. During the period from the 20th day of January, 2009 to the
Stamps.
19th day of April, 2009, both days inclusive, there shall be issued
throughout the State, special Commonwealth of Dominica postage
stamps (“BARACK OBAMA, 44TH PRESIDENT OF THE
UNITED STATES OF AMERICA” COMMEMORATIVE
STAMP ISSUE) of values and colours specified in Schedule I
Schedule I.
and the design specified in Schedule II.
Schedule II.
4. The dies and other implements required to give effect to
Dies
this Order shall be destroyed together with all residue whatsoever
of all stamps authorised by this Order, as soon as possible after
the 19th day of April, 2009.
5. This Order shall be deemed to have come into force on
Commencement
the 20th day of January, 2009.

2009 STAMP S.R.O. 9
SCHEDULE I
Adhesive stamps will be as follows:
1 Sheetlet @ $13.50
6 stamps @ $2.25 Deep Blue, Light Blue, Pale Blue,
Prussian Blue, Dark Blue, Orange
Brown, Lake, Deep Lake, Lavender,
Bright Yellow, Green, Rose Red, Pale
Brown and White
SCHEDULE II
1 Sheetlet @ $13.50
6 stamps @$2.25 depicts
President-elect Barack Obama
giving a speech
President-elect Barack Obama
squinting and looking ahead
President-elect Barack Obama
looking to his left
The seal of the President of the
United States
The eagle holding in the centre of
the seal holding a banner in its beak
Thirteen stars above the banner
Thirteen clouds above the stars
Fifty stars in the outer circle of
the Seal

2009 STAMP S.R.O. 9
The eagle clutching an olive branch
with thirteen leaves, in its right talon
The eagle clutching a bundle of
thirteen arrows in its left talon
Made this 6th day of February, 2009.
CHARLES A SAVARIN
Minister for Public Utilities.
DOMINICA
Printed by the Government Printer at the Government Printery, Roseau
(Price 60 cents)

I and the designs specified in the Schedule II hereto. Schedule II.

this Order shall be destroyed together with all residue whatsoever
